name: Taffy Apple Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the butter, powdered sugar, and egg yolks until well combined.
2. Gradually add the flour and mix until a dough forms.
3. Form small balls of the dough, about the size of a level teaspoon.
4. Place the balls on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 375°F for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden brown. Let cool completely.
6. Poke a round toothpick in the center of each cookie to test if it's done.
7. Melt caramels and milk in a double boiler over low heat, stirring constantly.
8. Dip the bottom half of the cooled cookies into the caramel mixture.
9. Immediately dip the coated cookies into crushed cocktail peanuts.
10. Transfer the cookies to mini paper cups (1 3/4 inch size).
11. Serve or store for later use.
These adorable cookies look just like mini taffy apples, perfect for fall gatherings or school events.
